title: trace.x request

session_id.description: 目标 xdebug session 标识。

signal.description: Final leaf signal path. Aggregate, array, and struct roots are not expanded automatically.

time.description: Target sample time. Prefer a canonical string with a unit; a bare number is interpreted only with time_unit.

time_unit.description: Interprets only unitless time numbers; it never overrides a time string that already has a unit.

value_format.description: Action-specific value_format input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

description: Trace an X value backward through bounded DFS branches to its sources or observability boundaries.
x-description-zh: 从指定信号和时间按受限 DFS 多分支追溯 X 的产生位置或不可见边界。
x-purpose: 从指定 signal/time 追溯 X。
x-how_it_works: 先确认查询值含 X，再按 DFS 同等追踪含 X 的 RHS/control；每条分支每一跳重新定位连续 X 区间起点并可多次向更早时间推进。深度停止时返回可直接续查的 frontier。
x-when_to_use: 找到一个或多个 X 候选源、不可见边界或受限现场。
x-arg_contract_notes: required: signal, time; optional: value_format; limits: max_depth, max_nodes, max_time_steps, max_trace_signals, max_chains(default 8)

use_when: 查询点含 X，需要按 DFS 同时追踪 RHS、control、端口和时间边界。
do_not_use_when: 只需要静态 driver 枚举，或查询点不含 X。

alternatives.when: 只需要指定时刻的单级 active driver。
需要传统单链 active-driver 展开。

constraints: required: signal, time; optional: value_format; limits: max_depth, max_nodes, max_time_steps, max_trace_signals, max_chains(default 8)
